subjects.description: An oncoming vehicle in the opposite lane, identifiable mainly by its intensely bright high-beam headlights piercing through the darkness; the body of the car is obscured behind the glare, only faint hints of a dark sedan silhouette visible around the light source
subjects.appearance_details: Two blinding white-blue headlight pools smeared into a vast diffused halo by sea fog, with soft lens-flare artifacts, halation, and bloom; faint amber side marker glow barely piercing the mist
subjects.relationship: The source of glare impairing the ego vehicle's visibility; travels directly opposite the ego on the shared bridge deck
subjects.location: center to slightly left of frame, approaching from background to midground
subjects.relative_size: Small within frame growing to Medium within frame as it nears
subjects.orientation: Front-facing toward the camera, headlights aimed directly at the ego viewpoint
subjects.action: Approaching on the opposite lane with high beams on, then passing by
subjects.state_changes: Grows from a faint fog halo to a blinding bloom as it crests the bridge crown, peaks at closest approach, then sweeps past to the left and dissolves back into the sea fog

subjects.description: The ego vehicle itself, represented only by its interior dashboard edge and the forward illumination of its own headlights spilling onto the road ahead
subjects.appearance_details: Faint dashboard reflection along the bottom edge of the frame, twin cones of headlight light spreading over the asphalt and lane markings
subjects.relationship: The point-of-view vehicle through which the entire scene is observed
subjects.location: implied at camera position, dashboard at bottom foreground
subjects.orientation: Facing forward down the road in the driving direction
subjects.action: Driving up the bridge span, cresting its crown, then continuing while slowing and resuming speed
subjects.state_changes: Decelerates significantly during peak glare, then accelerates back to nominal cruising speed

background_setting: A long coastal bridge in the dim first light of a foggy winter dawn, a two-lane span of damp concrete deck arcing over cold water lost in sea fog, low guard barriers on either side. The pre-dawn sky is a faint pale grey barely distinguishing from the fog; the far end of the span vanishes into murk. Worn lane markings glisten on the damp deck. The bridge arches up over its crown ahead, the rise briefly hiding then revealing the oncoming lane out of the fog. Beyond the barriers there is only grey nothing.

lighting.conditions: Dim foggy winter dawn over a bridge with faint pre-dawn sky; damp concrete deck, headlights on
lighting.direction: Ego headlights front-lit into sea fog; intense oncoming high-beam glare cresting the bridge crown ahead and slightly left, diffusing through mist
lighting.shadows: Almost no cast shadows in the flat fog; only the ego light cone on damp concrete
lighting.illumination_effect: Ego headlights glow back off drifting sea fog; oncoming high beams crest the span as a huge diffused halo with overwhelming bloom, soft starburst flares, and near washout

aesthetics.composition: Bridge deck arcing to its crown near mid-frame, oncoming glare blooming as a halo over the crest upper-center, dashboard edge at bottom
aesthetics.color_scheme: Pale grey fog and damp concrete over unseen water, cut by diffused white-blue headlight glare
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Tense, isolating, disorienting, near-blinding, very cautious in fog
aesthetics.patterns: Guard-barrier posts and faint dashed markings emerging from and vanishing into fog

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward dashcam tracking up the bridge span, subtle bob over the crown, deceleration drift then re-acceleration
cinematography.framing: Wide shot of the road ahead from driver viewpoint
cinematography.depth_of_field: Shallow effective depth as fog erases the background
cinematography.focus: Immediate deck ahead only, the span lost to fog; glare overwhelms focus at peak brightness

context: Demonstration of nighttime oncoming-headlight glare and driver visibility management on a coastal bridge

actions.description: Ego vehicle drives up the foggy bridge span at nominal speed, distant oncoming headlights appear as a faint diffused glow past the crown
Vehicle crests the bridge crown; oncoming high beams rapidly intensify into a fog-scattered halo, flooding the view with glare
Ego vehicle slows significantly to manage severely impaired visibility as the oncoming car passes on the left
Glare clears, the deck becomes visible again through fog, ego vehicle resumes nominal speed

segments.description: Driving up the foggy bridge span at steady speed with a faint diffused oncoming glow past the crown
segments.key_changes: A distant halo of headlights begins to bloom in the sea fog
segments.camera: Forward tracking with slight upward pitch on the climb

segments.description: Cresting the bridge crown as oncoming high beams flare into a severe fog-scattered halo
segments.key_changes: Rapid increase in brightness, huge diffused bloom and soft starburst wash across the frame
segments.camera: Subtle bob over the crest, then leveling into descent

segments.description: Ego vehicle slows for the passing car, then glare clears and nominal speed resumes across the deck
segments.key_changes: Deceleration, oncoming vehicle sweeps past left, halo fades, deck regains visibility, re-acceleration
segments.camera: Slight forward dip during braking, then smooth resumed forward tracking

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam view shows a fog-bound coastal bridge at dim dawn, ego headlights glowing off sea fog over damp concrete while a faint diffused glow grows past the bridge crown. By 0:01 the vehicle crests the span and a pair of oncoming high beams rapidly brightens into a halo. Through 0:02-0:03 the view is overwhelmed by fog-scattered white-blue glare, soft lens flares, and near-total bloom. Around 0:03 the ego slows noticeably to cope with severely impaired visibility as the oncoming car sweeps past on the left. From 0:04 to 0:05 the glare clears, the deck ahead reappears through fog, and the ego accelerates back to nominal cruising speed.
audio_description: Muffled low hum of the engine and damp tire noise on the concrete deck, rising then dipping as the vehicle decelerates. A distant foghorn, dripping condensation, a muted whoosh of the oncoming vehicle passing; no music or speech.
